title: Eltropy expands agentic AI certification
description: Eltropy, the leading agentic AI platform for credit unions and community banks, is expanding access to its AI Certification program — opening free enrollment to credit union and community bank professionals, and deepening the program's reach through league partnerships and industry events.

description: This high-growth AI company seems more likely to achieve $1 trillion in annual revenue in 2030.

title: AI deepfakes bill advanced by Senate Judiciary Committee
description: WASHINGTON — Unauthorized deepfake images generated by artificial intelligence would need to be removed from online platforms if they weren't licensed by the person portrayed, under a bill the Senate Judiciary Committee advanced on Thursday.
